_comment_source_convention: Athena is a single-plugin-per-skill marketplace: every entry under `plugins[*].source` points to `./` (the marketplace root) and the platform resolves the plugin by matching `name` against `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`. This differs from multi-plugin marketplaces whose entries each reference a sub-directory (e.g. `./plugins/<name>/`) — Athena's surface is intentionally one-plugin-per-skill under `skills/`, validated by `athena/validate_marketplace.py`.
name: Athena

metadata.description: Reusable Claude Code / Codex / Pi plugins and skills for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Library-side code lives in Hephaestus; skill bodies compose it via `from hephaestus.automation import …`.

plugins.name: advise
plugins.description: Search the ProjectMnemosyne skills registry for prior learnings before starting a task.

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: Design a feature before writing code — explore approaches, tradeoffs, and risks first.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Review completed work with a Sonnet reviewer and structured feedback reception.

plugins.name: create-reusable-utilities
plugins.description: Port or generalize utility scripts for cross-project reuse.

plugins.name: finish-branch
plugins.description: Branch completion workflow — run when implementation is complete.

plugins.name: git-worktrees
plugins.description: Create and manage isolated git worktree workspaces for parallel branch work.

plugins.name: github-actions-python-cicd
plugins.description: Set up a Python GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline.

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Capture session learnings as skills in the ProjectMnemosyne marketplace.

plugins.name: myrmidon-swarm
plugins.description: Hierarchical multi-agent orchestration for complex multi-step tasks.

plugins.name: python-repo-modernization
plugins.description: Bring a Python repository to production-grade quality.

plugins.name: repo-analyze
plugins.description: Comprehensive 15-dimension repository audit.

plugins.name: repo-analyze-full
plugins.description: Full-coverage repository audit — one swarm agent per section, no sampling cap.

plugins.name: repo-analyze-quick
plugins.description: Quick repository health check.

plugins.name: repo-analyze-quick-full
plugins.description: Quick repository health check with full file coverage.

plugins.name: repo-analyze-strict
plugins.description: Ruthlessly thorough repository audit.

plugins.name: repo-analyze-strict-full
plugins.description: Strict repository audit with full file coverage (swarm per section).

plugins.name: review-pr-strict
plugins.description: Ruthlessly thorough PR-alignment audit with full coverage.

plugins.name: skill-advisor
plugins.description: Route a task to the correct skill before beginning work.

plugins.name: systematic-debugging
plugins.description: Root-cause-first debugging before proposing fixes.

plugins.name: test-driven-development
plugins.description: RED-GREEN-REFACTOR discipline before writing implementation code.

plugins.name: tidy
plugins.description: Rebase all local branches onto trunk with swarm conflict resolution.

plugins.name: verification
plugins.description: Audit a claim (metric, CI result, benchmark) and report whether it is backed by runnable evidence per Odysseus ADR-014.

plugins.name: worktree-cleanup
plugins.description: Audit and prune git worktrees without deleting branches.
